news.t: Cellares Grows Series D to $327 Million with $50 Million Prime Radiant Partners Investment
This momentum fund has dodged U.S. stocks and trounced the competition

holdings.infoBox: IDMO is an equity ETF with a total of 206 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 4.43%, The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 4.14%, Banco Santander at 3.92%, Kioxia Holdings at 2.61%, and Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 2.51%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P International Developed Momentum ETF (IDMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P World Ex-U.S. Momentum index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap stocks from developed markets excluding the US. Stocks are selected by price momentum and weighted by momentum, scaled by market cap. IDMO was launched on Feb 24, 2012 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Cellares Grows Series D to $327 Million with $50 Million Prime Radiant Partners Investment
